title: Crumbly Greek Pumpkin Crumble
description: A rich and crumbly greek pumpkin dish featuring clear honey, bhuna spices, with a pescatarian-friendly option.
instructions: Cut pumpkins into slices, remove seeds and fibers.
In a baking dish coated with cooking spray or oil, layer the pumpkin slices cut side down. Drizzle honey over each slice.
Combine lemon juice, bhuna spice mix, cardamom, and salt in a bowl. Pour over pumpkin slices evenly.
Bake for 45 minutes until golden brown and tender. Allow to cool slightly before crumbly topping layering.
In a mixing bowl combine remaining spices (cinnamon, nutmeg) and softened unsalted butter to make the crumble mixture.
Top cooled pumpkin with crumble mixture evenly and bake at 350°F (175°C) for an additional 10-15 minutes until golden.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
